title: Represent a structured log event
scenario: Structured logging starts with events that have names and levels instead of ad-hoc strings.
instructions: Define LogLevel and LogEvent with event_name and level fields.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps log-event-struct explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
